questionHtml:
What is the type of bonding in a compound that has high boiling and melting points, poor electrical conductivity, and low solubility in water?

A.  Ionic

B.  Molecular covalent

C.  Metallic

D.  Giant covalent

meta.title: What is the type of bonding in a compound that has high boiling and melting points, poor electrical conductivity, and low solubility in water? A. Ionic B. Molecular covalent C. Met
